title: ICARION Domain Fields Configuration
description: Electric and magnetic field configuration for domain (v1.1+ with waveform support)

field_arrays.description: Optional list of precomputed field-array terms (1 V normalization)

scale_kind.description: Scaling kind for this field term

constant_V.description: Constant scaling factor or RF gain multiplier [V]

frequency_Hz.description: Optional RF frequency override for this term [Hz]

phase_rad.description: Additional phase offset for this RF term [rad]

EN_Td.description: Reduced electric field strength in Townsend (1 Td = 10^-21 V·m²). Can be static or time-varying (v1.1+)

axial_V.description: Axial DC voltage [V]. Can be static value, inline waveform, or @waveform_ref (v1.1+)

radial_V.description: Radial DC voltage [V]. Can be static value, inline waveform, or @waveform_ref (v1.1+)

quad_V.description: Quadrupolar DC voltage [V]. Can be static value, inline waveform, or @waveform_ref (v1.1+)

enable_radial_sweep.description: DEPRECATED: Enable radial DC voltage sweep. Use waveforms instead (v1.1+)

radial_slope_V_s.description: DEPRECATED: Radial DC voltage sweep slope [V/s]. Use linear waveform instead

radial_start_time_s.description: DEPRECATED: Radial DC voltage sweep start time [s]. Use linear waveform instead

radial_rise_time_s.description: DEPRECATED: Radial DC voltage sweep rise time [s]. Use linear waveform instead

voltage_V.description: RF amplitude in volts [V]. Can be static value, inline waveform, or @waveform_ref (v1.1+)

frequency_Hz.description: RF frequency in Hz. Can be static or time-varying (chirp) (v1.1+)

voltage_V.description: AC excitation amplitude in volts [V]. Can be static value, inline waveform, or @waveform_ref (v1.1+)

frequency_Hz.description: AC excitation frequency in Hz. Can be static or time-varying (v1.1+)

enable_voltage_sweep.description: DEPRECATED: Enable AC voltage amplitude sweep. Use linear waveform instead (v1.1+)

amplitude_slope_V_s.description: DEPRECATED: AC voltage amplitude sweep slope in V/s. Use linear waveform instead

start_time_s.description: DEPRECATED: AC voltage sweep start time in seconds. Use linear waveform instead

rise_time_s.description: DEPRECATED: AC voltage rise time in seconds. Use linear waveform instead

enable_frequency_sweep.description: DEPRECATED: Enable AC frequency sweep. Use linear waveform instead (v1.1+)

start_freq_Hz.description: DEPRECATED: AC frequency sweep start frequency in Hz. Use linear waveform instead

sweep_slope_Hz_per_s.description: DEPRECATED: AC frequency sweep slope in Hz/s. Use linear waveform instead

field_strength_T.description: Magnetic field vector in Tesla (for FT-ICR etc.)

field_gradient_T_m.description: Magnetic field gradient vector in Tesla per meter
